mapper.insert: INSERT INTO code_group ( group_code, group_name, created_at ) VALUES ( #{group_code}, #{group_name}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM code_group WHERE group_code = #{group_code} AND is_deleted = 'N'
SELECT * FROM code_group WHERE is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY group_code ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE code_group SET group_name = #{group_name}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE group_code = #{group_code}
UPDATE code_group SET is_deleted = 'Y', deleted_at = NOW() WHERE group_code = #{group_code}
